message:
data(audit): record database, gRPC streaming audits (all SOUND)

SQLite cancel-commit race is intentional (ROLLBACK is no-op if COMMIT
ran, caller sees Cancelled for retry-safety). gRPC streaming no waker
race (&mut self prevents concurrent push+poll).

Session total: 166 files, 9 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
